title: cynanchum tylophoroides
intro: Cynanchum tylophoroides, also known as Tylophora, is a perennial plant species in the Apocynaceae family, native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimalarial properties. The health benefits of Cynanchum tylophoroides include treating respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of malaria. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically dried and made into teas, capsules, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
